MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Blanding in pro per.
Lucky Nguyen for Sonia Alvarado, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the settlement agreement, which was not filed with the court for premises located at 1762 Quesada Ave. San Francisco, CA 94124. Trial date of 2/2/09 is vacated.
